\tzpentry{ID4936}{Magnetization Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4936 introduces Magnetization Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \MaxwellStress \implies \omega[t] = \omega[0] \exp\left(\int_0^t \gamma_{\text{amp}} d\tau\right) \end{equation}
